typography.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-medium tracking-tighter leading-[1.1]

components.button_primary: bg-[#6BE05A] text-[#0A0A0A] font-semibold px-8 py-4 rounded-full hover:bg-[#58C248] transition-colors focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#6BE05A] focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-offset-[#0A0A0A]
components.button_secondary: bg-transparent text-white border border-white/20 font-semibold px-8 py-4 rounded-full hover:bg-white/10 transition-colors
components.bento_card: bg-[#141414] border border-white/10 rounded-2xl p-8 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:border-white/20 transition-all duration-300 flex flex-col justify-between
components.header: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 bg-[#0A0A0A]/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/10
components.metric_number: text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-medium text-[#6BE05A] tracking-tighter mb-4

design_rules: Use geometric precision and ample negative space (p-8, p-12).
No soft shadows. Rely on 1px borders (border-white/10) for depth.
Accent color (#6BE05A) must be used sparingly to draw attention to key metrics and CTAs.
Ensure high contrast: text should be bright white or light grey against the dark background.
Bento grid items must have h-full to stretch evenly.
Avoid centered text blocks except in the final CTA or specific constrained headers; prefer left-aligned typography for an editorial feel.

page_structure.description: Sticky nav with LinkOps logo left, Contact CTA right. Use backdrop-blur.

Headline: 'Consistent Pipeline. Zero Manual Effort.' Sub: high-level value prop. CTA 'Secure Your Growth Audit'. Accompanied by minimal abstract green line graphic representing an upward trend. Left-aligned text for executive feel.

Bento grid (e.g., 2 large cards, 2 small cards, or symmetric 4 cards). 35% sales-ready opportunities increase, 15+ Hours reclaimed per week, 100% Verified outreach, 24/7 Always-on presence. Numbers must be huge and electric green.
4 phases: Targeted Intelligence, Narrative Excellence, Seamless Integration, Scalable ROI. Displayed as clean bordered rows or a 2x2 grid.
Built for Scale. Testimonial carousel or grid using high-end executive portraits. Highlight '4x ROI in 90 days' case study snippet.
Predictability vs Leads. Value proposition comparing the old way vs the LinkOps advantage.
Massive typography 'Stop Guessing. Start Closing.' Centered, with 'Request Your Custom Growth Plan' CTA button opening a modal.
Minimalist footer with copyright and essential links. Darker background.

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the contact modal using Shadcn UI Dialog. Fields: Name, Email, Company, Message.
All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='hero-cta-button', data-testid='contact-submit').
Use Framer Motion for subtle scroll reveal animations (fade-in up) on bento cards and sections.
Ensure the design matches the Cassis template aesthetic: sophisticated, high-end, uncluttered, leveraging borders instead of drop-shadows.
Do not use generic placeholder images. Use only the URLs provided in this JSON.
Make sure navigation is fully accessible and CTA buttons stand out with the #6BE05A green against the dark theme.
